faq.title: Answers before you spend a dollar

items.a: Full credit refund, automatically. Any model-side failure (quality, policy rejection, timeout) is detected and refunded — no ticket needed.
Never. Bought credits stay yours forever. No expiry, no burn-rate pressure.

items.q: Which of the 8 models should I pick?
items.a: Every model shows sample output and per-video cost in the UI. General use: Seedance 2.0 (best value). Premium feel: Sora 2 or VEO 3.1. High volume: Hailuo 2.3.
Yes. 25% off annual, invoiced billing, API access, dedicated queue, white-label. Email sales@video.yeadon.top.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay. China mainland users: Alipay (CNY rail).
